name: daily-briefing
description: Daily intelligence briefing with schedule, weather, markets, and news. Configurable sections, multiple data sources, runs on schedule or on demand.

interface.shortDescription: Start every day with a structured intelligence packet.
interface.longDescription: Two skills that produce a daily briefing: (1) Briefing Data fetches weather, markets, and news from free public APIs with zero-config defaults. (2) Briefing Engine assembles everything into a formatted briefing with your calendar, weather, market snapshot, top news, and a daily focus suggestion. Runs on a cron schedule or on demand. Every section is optional and configurable — use what matters, skip what doesn't.
defaultPrompt: Brief me on markets and weather.
